◎简　　介  

　　King is a Canadian police drama which premièred 17 April 2011 on Showcase. The series stars Amy Price-Francis as Jessica King, a veteran police officer who gets promoted to head of the Major Crimes Task Force in Toronto after her predecessor has a breakdown on television.

writer.name: 格雷格·斯波蒂斯伍德 Greg Spottiswood
